title: Onboarding - Eula page - App in the background
scenario: EULA page animation stops working after app is sent to background and reopened during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (fresh install or after clearing data).
2. Complete any initial setup screens until reaching the EULA (End User License Agreement) page.
3. Observe the EULA page content: verify the agreement text, License Agreement link, Privacy Policy link, a blurred Continue button, and working animation are all displayed.
4. Press the Home button or switch to another app to send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background.
6. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app from the recent apps list or home screen.
7. Observe the app state and EULA page content.
expected: The app remains on the same EULA page with all content intact (agreement text, License Agreement link, Privacy Policy link, blurred Continue button) and the animation still working.
